title: pilosella × obornyana subsp. superpratensis
intro: Pilosella × obornyana subsp. superpratensis is a rare, hybrid species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant, also known as a hawkweed, contains sesquiterpene lactones with medicinal properties, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pilosella × obornyana subsp. superpratensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a subject of interest in traditional herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its flowers, leaves, or roots, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions.
